titulo: AI-generated passwords aren't as secure as they appear
resumo: That AI-generated password looks strong, but pattern recognition and training data make it far less random than you think.

titulo: How Poetry Is Diabolically Being Used In Everyday Prompts To Get AI To Do Things It Isn’t Supposed To Do
autor: Lance Eliot, Contributor, Lance Eliot, Contributor https://www.forbes.com/sites/lanceeliot/
resumo: Hackers and evildoers are using adversarial poetry to jailbreak AI. The trick involves writing poems as prompts. AI safeguards can be averted. An AI Insider scoop.
